Predicates(identified by ID):
  0: Split Range: (STARTS_WITH($AlbumTitle, 'T') AND ($AlbumTitle LIKE 'T%e'))
  1: Split Range: (($SingerId' = $SingerId) AND ($AlbumId' = $AlbumId))
